en.name: Pac-Man
en.desc: The most famous video game character! Eat all dots while avoiding colorful ghosts. Power pellets let you turn the tables. Waka waka waka!
en.howToPlay: Use arrow keys to guide Pac-Man through the maze. Eat all dots to win. Avoid ghosts unless powered up. Power pellets make ghosts vulnerable temporarily.
tips: Learn ghost patterns - each has unique behavior
Clear one side of the maze at a time

zh.name: 吃豆人
zh.desc: 最著名的电子游戏角色！吃掉所有豆子同时躲避彩色幽灵。能量豆让你反败为胜。哇咔哇咔哇咔！
zh.howToPlay: 使用方向键移动吃豆人。吃掉豆子得分。避开幽灵——被碰到会失去一条命。吃掉能量球可以暂时反击幽灵。
tips: 能量球时优先追逐幽灵
学习每个幽灵的行为模式
规划路线以最大化效率
